---
title: "Prospect Research Toolkit"
---
::: {.column-margin}
![...](https://i.postimg.cc/W1STySKW/prospect-research-toolkit-large-logo-prototype-one-1.png)
:::

***
Howdy, partner. Welcome to camp!

This is the Prospect Research Toolkit, a free resource for prospect research professionals. This ecclectic blog aims to create a regularly updated repository of information about fundraising software tools, data sources, research methodology, and industry analysis. I originally envisioned it as a comprehensive one-stop-shop, but there are much smarter people than me out there creating excellent content, so I will be focusing on interactive elements and original research that interests me.

---

For more info about the scope of this project, feel free to check out the [About](about.qmd) page. Some unpolished [Field Notes](field_notes.qmd) are available, but the tool comparison dashboard and other more interesting things are still in development.

Thanks for reading and happy trails.

***

---
**Version: {{< var version >}}**
